programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A client enlists Dave on a mission from God to make his dreams of a father/son road trip along Route 66 come true; getting the client's mechanically unsound reproduction of the Bluesmobile ready for the road will test the crew's mettle.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: A longtime customer has his eye set on a car from Joe's personal collection, a 1967 Nova; Joe counters by offering up a 1966 Nova, with the guarantee that it will be twice the car Joe's is; big brakes, big power, big wheels and more.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: The guys bring a 1964 Lincoln back with a late-model Coyote engine and handmade interior; the Sling-Ray is a custom automotive sensation, but Ekstensive has what it's been missing.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and Kev take the show to the Midwest, as more than 2,500 cars descend on the Summit Motorsports drag strip for a weekend of fun; Kev gets a ride in a lean, mean drag racing machine; Dave steps up his autocross game.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: With updates well underway on custom car guru Joe Martin's prized '65 Pontiac Catalina, Joe and the boys at Martin Bros. Customs give the ol' choppy-doo to a '41 DeSoto that has seen better days.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Truck builds tend to get bigger than originally planned, so it's no surprise when a 1971 Suburban goes even bigger with a custom lifted air suspension and interior; a nearly finished 2006 Kodiak needs just one more custom upgrade.

programme.title: Unique Rides
programme.desc: Team Unique customizes entertainer Nick Cannon's 1967 Chevrolet Chevelle, a 750 horsepower supercharged monster in need of a new interior.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The 1965 Mustang makes its way through the metal shop and is now ready for paint and final assembly; making it function will test even the Kindig crew.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave has decided that the time is right to design his own concept car from scratch; it's a huge job that involves all the different departments in the shop.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Shag and Amanda get a '65 Chevy II Nova for a steal, but as the team digs in, rat nests and rust are the least of their worries; the build requires a complete overhaul and has them thinking they bit off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: A 1971 Suburban returns to the shop for "phase two," wanting more power and custom metalwork; when a client finds parts and pieces of a '68 C10, Bill and the crew set on a new course for a ground-up build.

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Renowned editor Maxwell Perkins (Colin Firth) develops a friendship with author Thomas Wolfe (Jude Law) while working on the writer's manuscripts.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: Walter Keane (Christoph Waltz) achieves worldwide fame for pop-art portraits of saucer-eyed waifs, but no one knows that it's his wife, Margaret (Amy Adams), who's the real genius behind the paintbrush.

programme.title: The Founder
programme.desc: The true story of how Ray Kroc (Michael Keaton) maneuvered himself into a position to buy the 1950s burger operation of Mac and Dick McDonald and create a multi-billion dollar fast food empire.

programme.title: The Imitation Game
programme.desc: Genius British logician and cryptologist Alan Turing (Benedict Cumberbatch) helps crack Germany's Enigma Code during World War II but is later prosecuted by his government for illegal homosexual acts.

programme.title: Love & Mercy
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, the Beach Boys' Brian Wilson stops touring, produces "Pet Sounds" and begins to lose his grip on reality. By the 1980s, Wilson (John Cusack), under the sway of a controlling therapist, finds a savior in Melinda Ledbetter.
A story of how obsession, addiction and abuse cause a young woman to execute an elaborate plan of revenge.

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: Rodney Dangerfield plays self-made millionaire Thornton Mellon, owner of a chain of tall and fat clothing stores, who, after divorcing his philandering wife, enrolls in college to keep his son from dropping out.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension
programme.desc: Buckaroo Banzai is a rock-star/brain-surgeon/comic-book-hero/samurai who along with his group, the Hong Kong Cavaliers, must stop evil creatures from the 8th dimension (all named John) who are trying to conquer our dimension.

programme.title: Blow Out
programme.desc: A Philadelphia sound-effects man witnesses and records a car accident that turns out to be a politically motivated murder.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A teenage boy's incredible werewolf powers improve the quality of his life in dramatic and hilarious ways.

programme.title: Mac and Me
programme.desc: A young boy confined to a wheelchair finds a lost alien creature and helps him return to his home and learn many magical things in the process.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: La cultura otomí y chichimeca unidos en una tradición que sobresale.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Las montañas de Varunga son la personificación de las fantasías occidentales sobre el África profunda y oscura, donde habitan algunos de los animales más emblemáticos del mundo.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Desde su época de adversarios peligrosos hasta cazadores colonialistas, hasta los desafíos actuales y considerables de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Viaje Cicladas del norte, donde las callejuelas cuidadosamente pavimentadas, los molinos de viento, los palomares, los olivares y las playas están bañados por la luz del sol, lo que lo convierte en un destino de ensueño.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Polonia ha superado mucha adversidad y tiene una historia fascinante. Sus múltiples facetas revelan un país lleno de sorpresas. Este es un retrato cautivador de Polonia y de un pueblo en transformación.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Desde el comportamiento en sus manadas, pasando por esconderse a simple vista, hasta construir sólidas fortificaciones, los animales pueden defenderse sabiamente.

programme.desc: In New Mexico, Jessica links the murder of the owner of an Old West tourist attraction to buried treasure.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The future son-in-law (Sean O'Bryan) of a prominent Cabot Cove family is suspected in the shooting of a hardware store employee.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy cree que Mariana y Esteban son amantes al ver que él la abraza efusivamente. Esteban entonces se acerca a Willy y confiesa que le gusta Mariana, pero también le gusta Margot.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy le pide a Margot que se case con él, pero no por la iglesia. Morgana le pide que así sea por su posición social. Leonora le pide a Santiago no decirle a Willy que ella y Pepita son la misma persona.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario lleva a Iván para hablar con el doctor. Le explica lo que ha pasado con su hijo y con la bebida de Jimena. La enfermera entra de improviso, informando que al niño le dio un paro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura y Luis Mario le dicen a Jimena que el bebé se murió. Patricio y Camelia siguen preparando la trampa para casarse con Rosaura. Jimena está muy mal, entonces Rosaura y Luis Mario tratan de calmarla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva se besan y hablan de su hijo. Maximiliano le dice a Rosaura que el la ama y quiere casarse con ella, que él es libre, no como Luis Mario, quien está casado y no podrá hacerla su esposa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario besa a Rosaura y luego la deja, empujándola y llamándola engreída y minina. Fernando le cuenta a Bruno todo lo que pasó. Bruno le dice que esa es su casa y ellos su familia.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora va a la cárcel donde está el Alacrán, quien le confiesa que luego de robarle a sus hijas, se las entregó a Miguelina.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano les cuenta a su mamá Octavia y a su tía Yolanda que Diana y Gaby son las hijas de Fedora.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Larry entra a la habitación de su madre y le pide una explicación respecto a un artículo publicado en el periódico acerca de Octavia como presunta estafadora.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana decide que Diego es quien debe estar en la sala de parto y le pide a Maximiliano que salga inmediatamente.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Leonora se despide de Ernesto y le indica que todo saldrá bien, que ella lo sacará de la cárcel y ganará a Mariana como hija. Luciano y Willy hablan con Martín para averiguar sobre el supuesto hijo de Lupe.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana se enfrenta a Leonora y le reclama por mentir sobre las joyas. Leonora se defiende, jurando no haberlas robado y que sirvieron para que su padre no fuese transferido a la cárcel.

programme.title: Ivory Hecker Tonight
programme.desc: Ivory Hecker Tonight is an uncensored political news talk show that prioritizes filling in the blanks when politicians and media outlets lie through omission. Ivory prioritizes curiosity and citizen questions over loyalty to any political party.

programme.title: Fine Point With Chanel Rion
programme.desc: Chanel Rion leads bold and uncensored discourse on Big Tech, Big Media, and Big Government. From thought leaders to world leaders, join Chanel as she pierces through the scripts, and reads between the lies. Weeknights on OAN.

programme.desc: Real America with Dan Ballbrings you the latest political headlines, by interviewing news makers of the day, to include politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights

programme.title: ONE Vault

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: Legend faced phenom for the ONE Strawweight Muay Thai World Title at ONE: Battleground.

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights

programme.title: ONE Event

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, Nico, and Zoro get trapped in the Rainbow Mist along with Henzo. The aging scientist is looking for answers, the Straw Hats want treasure, and the ghosts who haunt the mist want them all to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew search for a way out of Ape’s Concert, but the Rainbow Mist is an inescapable maze of madness. Back on shore, Nami, Chopper, and Sanji face a lifetime of hard labor for failing to pay their taxes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The showdown with Mayor Wetton builds towards an explosive finale as the Straw Hats scramble to escape the Rainbow Mist – or be trapped inside forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are nearly crushed by the falling wreckage of a ship that’s over 200 years old. Could rumors of a floating island in the sky be true? Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji go scuba diving to find out!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Still searching for a route to the island in the sky, the Straw Hats chart a course for Jaya. Meanwhile, Fire-Fist Ace crashes a party aboard a vessel helmed by Buggy the Pirate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats drop anchor at a town overrun by scallywags, so Nami makes the boys swear to stay out of trouble. But when the Bellamy Pirates come looking for a fight, Luffy may have to break his promise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico’s handy work unearths a solitary dreamer who may know the way to Sky Island. All Luffy and his crew have to do is survive the sonic onslaught of simian salvagers seeking to sink the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates reach the home of Mont Blanc Cricket: the man with the key to reaching Sky Island. There’s just one tiny problem – he comes from a long line of legendary liars.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Montblanc Cricket agrees to help the Straw Hats reach Sky Island, but first they must venture deep into the darkest depths of a spider-infested forest to capture a mysterious bird with a keen sense of direction.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats battle creepy-crawly forest creatures on their quest to capture a South Bird, Mont Blanc and his monkey minions are brutally attacked by the Bellamy Pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turned the other cheek during his first encounter with Bellamy, but now he’s out to settle the score for old man Mont Blanc. Meanwhile, a fearsome pirate crew takes aim at the Straw Hats, eager to earn a bad reputation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some modifications to the Going Merry, the Straw Hats are on their way to that island in the sky! But with the Blackbeard Pirates in hot pursuit, navigating the vertical currents will be anything but easy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Reaching the sea of clouds proves easier than surviving in it when giant sea creatures attack the Going Merry, Usopp nearly drowns in a cloud, and a strange sky knight issues the Straw Hats a warning!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After hitching a ride on a speedy shrimp, the Straw Hats reach the land of Skypiea! The intrepid pirates have much to learn about their new surroundings, but a beautiful angel makes a perfect tour guide.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s eagerness to explore the forbidden realm of Upper Yard brings her face to face with the wrath of god, and the Straw Hats incur Heaven’s Judgment for failing to pay their immigration fees!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are no strangers to living on the wrong side of the law, but unpaid immigration fees and Nami’s assault of a White Beret earns Luffy’s crew a sentence of death by cloud drifting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Zoro, Chopper, and Robin are trapped aboard the Going Merry when it’s commandeered by a monstrous lobster! To rescue his crew, Luffy must venture onto the sacred grounds of Upper Yard!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Conis helps Luffy and his mates launch their rescue mission, but the rubber-man senses something amiss. When he presses her for answers, a vengeful god takes a shot at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro dukes it out with a hungry Skyshark in the shadow of the Sacrificial Alter. On the other side of Upper Yard, Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp try to survive their visit to an island that wants them dead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp tangle with Satori and his exploding, snake-filled Surprise Clouds. The sky priest may look like a dancing dango, but the impact of his mantra leaves the pirates bloodied and boatless.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Sanji try to regain control of the Crow, and Luffy stirs up a brutal barrage of bursting balls when he attacks Satori. Meanwhile, Chopper whistles for the Sky Knight to avoid becoming a sacrificial reindeer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper fights bravely to stop Shura from incinerating the Going Merry, but the little reindeer is no match for a sky priest. Gan Fall is on his way, but will the dispossessed deity arrive in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Gan Fall is badly burned during his battle with Shura, Chopper musters the courage for a death-defying leap of faith. Elsewhere, Luffy may have finally discovered a way to defeat Satori!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.desc: Puebla, Mexico - According to Tony, the best line cooks in NYC come from Mexico, so he travels to the Puebla, and enjoys mole sauces, toasted ant eggs, fried worms, and the legendary pulque (a slightly hallucinogenic drink made from cactus sap).

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the culinary highlights of Jalisco’s capital city, Guadalajara. She starts at a street cart to taste the city’s most iconic sandwich, tortas ahogadas. Then, she meets one of the city’s best chefs, Fabian Delgado.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Guadalajara is the cultural epicenter of Jalisco, drawing some of the most creative artists, musicians and chefs from all over Mexico. Pati explores some unique spots where food and art truly connect. In her kitchen.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati stops at a couple of beloved restaurants in Guadalajara for two classic dishes. At Super Menuderia Cano, she learns the secrets to their menudo that’s so good people line up down the block waiting to get in.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Some say that Jalisco is the birthplace of Mariachi. Pati learns about the history, the instruments, and the meaning behind that beloved music that pulls at the heartstrings of so many Mexicans.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati experiences a unique and storied part of this part of Jalisco’s charro culture: the Escaramuza. An all-female horse riding and skills competition honoring the woman charros who fought for Mexico’s independence.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati meets chef and historian Maru Toledo who is working to preserve and pass on some of Jalisco’s most important regional recipes. She then goes to Hacienda Romo for a first-hand look at the influence of hacienda culture.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati meets the chefs at one of Guadalajara’s most exciting restaurants, Xokol, where they use heritage corn to create a menu full of delicious dishes. In Tequila, Chef Marin from Solar de Las Animas creates a drink and dessert inspired by his grandmother.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits the birthplace of Mexico’s most famous spirit, the town of Tequila, where she learns about the history of tequila making and gets an up-close look at the whole process from the agave fields to the tasting table.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in one of Mexico’s most popular beach destinations — Puerto Vallarta. She gets an insider’s tour of the best street food from one of the town’s most acclaimed chefs, Thierry Boulet.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In this episode, Pati celebrates everyone’s favorite Mexican creation, the taco. She tries two of Jalisco’s best tacos — marlin tacos in Puerto Vallarta and barbacoa tacos in Guadalajara.

programme.title: Sin identidad
programme.desc: María, con la ayuda de Pablo, encuentra a su hermana pequeña que se había escapado, lo que provoca que ambas se conozcan y que la niña quiera irse a vivir con María.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: En un evento benéfico para recaudar fondos, encuentran al anfitrión Malcolm Powell muerto en su estudio. La asistente personal de Malcolm asegura saber quién es el culpable; un hombre misterioso al que vieron llegar y luego huir de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: La tragedia golpea la isla de Saint Marie cuando asesinan al detective en la fiesta de reencuentro de su universidad. ¿Podrá su sustituto, el detective Goodman, ganarse el respeto de sus nuevos colegas al resolver este caso tan delicado y desafiante?

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: El detective Goodman y su equipo quedan perplejos ante la aparente muerte al azar de un doble en un set de filmación. Con razones suficientes para pensar que el asesino podría volver a atacar, el equipo debe actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: Los asesinatos de Midsomer

programme.title: Los asesinatos de Midsomer

programme.title: Agua seca

programme.desc: The buyers return to Fort Worth, where a local auctioneer joins as a bidder and stirs things up with Ricky and Bubba. Jenny and Mary disagree on the value of their finds, and one makes a surprising profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: The auction returns to the town of Mesquite, and so does Ricky and Bubba's nemesis Kenny Stowe. The Rangers go chasing after vengeance, and their aim is true on a find that brings out a hidden talent.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Search for the Yeti
programme.desc: The team from Finding Bigfoot travel around the world to Nepal in search of the infamous Yeti. They visit monasteries with Yeti relics, talk to firsthand witnesses, and travel into the dense forests of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: A startling piece of Bigfoot footage sends the team to northern Georgia.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: While the excavation of Smith's Cove continues to uncover an abundance of ancient structures, Rick, Marty and the team resume the treasure hunt in H8 convinced more than ever it is the site of the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: A shocking new discovery at Smith's Cove suggests that the origin of the Oak Island mystery may date much earlier.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: La policía intenta detener a un asesino que ha matado a sangre fría a un hombre; otro grupo se debe enfrentar a familiares y vecinos para lograr detener a jóvenes traficantes y ladrones.

programme.title: ¡Alto! Frontera
programme.desc: Cocaína detectada en un calzoncillo y en una vitrina. En la frontera mexicana, llegan pandillas a complicar el difícil tránsito de migrantes

programme.title: ¡Alto! Frontera
programme.desc: Impactantes historias de inocentes y criminales acorralados en el tráfico de dinero y drogas en México, Chile, Perú Colombia y Bolivia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer no quiere que interrumpan su paseo nocturno. Un pésimo conductor tiene consecuencias al jugar con la vida de personas inocentes. Una cita termina con un accidente de carro y dos esposados.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía hace un análisis forense cuando dos sospechosos niegan la evidencia de cigarrillos. La cena se arruina cuando un compañero lanza puñetazos. Un hombre sostiene que le están tendiendo una trampa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre quiere confrontar a su esposa por sus acusaciones graves. Los oficiales quedan perplejos cuando un sospechoso explica sus pertenencias con mucho detalle. Un conductor mentiroso es desmentido.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso entra en pánico cuando descubren sus planes. Una mujer comete una violación de tránsito mientras va al salón de belleza. Una relación intensa termina en golpes.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una situación de alto riesgo sirve como lección. Un sospechoso despistado intenta conseguir dinero estafando a dos detectives. Una conductora se mete en problemas por no saber contar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Hay un duelo entre oficiales y fugitivo. Les sale el tiro por la culata a dos hermanos fingiendo estar calmados. Una pelea insignificante entre vecinos se intensifica cuando uno recurre a la venganza.

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir
programme.desc: Un oso se come a un marido infiel, viejo pervertido explota, una novia muere en el altar, un ladrón de paquetes recibe una sorpresa de ántrax, un insomne atropella y huye, unos hípsteres barbudos mueren, pantalones de un trabajador borracho explotan.

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir
programme.desc: Un falso discapacitado muere en ascensor, estafador criogénico se congela, luchadora resbala en aceite, instructor de conducción pierden el control, pastelero congela su propio pastel, explota un capataz de mina de carbón, una mujer tóxica se la traga.

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir
programme.desc: Un político tiene un ataque de estornudo, anciano con una pistola explota, mujer furiosa con el tránsito recibe una en el estómago, un final impactante para un convicto, motociclista recibe lo que se merece, una campista hierve de amor por sus amigos.

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir
programme.desc: Un ladrón de bancos se expone por un amigo, una pelirroja es derribada, un adolescente rudo se encuentra con un buzón, una compradora se da un chapuzón, un gordo pierde la cabeza, un pedo que mata.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales rastrean a un ladrón de tiendas que se dedica exclusivamente a hurtar productos de bebés. Un novio angustiado no puede soportar más su complicada relación.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor lleva a su hija peque˜ña en el asiento trasero cuando atropella a un ciclista y huye. Un robo dirige a la policía hacia una mujer loca con artículos desagradables. Un hijastro comienza a actuar erráticamente y acaba mal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un pasajero salta del carro en persecución. Un hombre ingenuo se ve en peligro cuando trata de ganar dinero fácil. Un oficial investiga a un hombre que reconoce caminando en una calle oscura.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre con orden de arresto se atreve a escapar de los oficiales. Agentes encubiertos llevan a cabo una operación en un área de prostitución. Una pelea entre primos se descontrola cuando alguien saca un cuchillo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre amenaza a sus vecinos y luego lanza su ira contra los oficiales. Un sospechoso culpa a su amigo por lo que los agentes encuentran en su pantalón. Un conductor en crisis arriesga la vida de todos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén se complica cuando un sospechoso crea una distracción momentánea. Un hombre se niega a dar su nombre real, pero los oficiales encuentran una pista. Un conductor se niega a declarar con la verdad.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: En este episodio, un clubista aplastado por la bocina de una discoteca; una adolescente con un bulto causado por el tirante del sostén; una colegiala con un trozo de vía de tren de juguete atrapado en su dedo.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: En este episodio, un escolar golpeado por la perilla de una puerta; un estudiante con una aguja de 3 cm insertada en la pierna; y un hombre que accidentalmente metió la mano en alquitrán hirviente.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo
programme.desc: El maestro de escuela Ian, se dirige al desierto de Tasmania a una aventura nocturna.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer buscada por la policía intenta mentirles a los agentes pero es delatada por su hermano. Las verduras enlatadas vuelan durante una pelea entre compañeras. Una pareja aprende el valor de la honestidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre da su perspectiva sobre su propio arresto. Los oficiales tienen que lidiar con un hombre agresivo y salsa de BBQ. Una persecución a baja velocidad termina en casa de la novia del conductor.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El pasajero de un auto en persecución logra escapar, pero el conductor no. Un motociclista fugitivo casi pierde a otra patrulla antes de estrellarse. Una mujer acusa a un hombre de querer robarle el pelo.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex, C.D. and a group of fifth- and sixth-grade students from a Dallas-area elementary school are kidnapped by mercenaries, who demand $10 million in ransom.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a brilliant extortionist who has placed a bomb on a ship in a deadly plot to gain several million dollars.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar y Jimena alargan su divorcio, él le pide que ayude a Juan, lo mismo hace Franco con Sara, las dos prometen hablar con Norma. Rosario reconoce que su matrimonio es un fracaso.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se queja con Gabriela de la paliza que le dieron los Reyes, Sara revela que él la atacó y le dice a Norma que su mamá y Dínora buscan alejarla de Juan. Óscar descubre a Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma renuncia al consultorio, le asusta la cercanía de Fernando con Juan David, también Ruth se retira de la Casa de Modas por presión de su mamá. Juan se niega a asistir a la cena de Dínora.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José reúne a todos los hermanos y se enfrenta a Juan porque quiere reemplazarlo. Julieta mantiene su posición con dignidad y no accede a hacer las paces con su marido, mientras Paula decide seguir insistiendo sin saber que una verdad la persigue.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La envidia termina por separar y enfrentar a los hermanos del Monte. Julieta entra a la casa de Sofía y Paula para destrozarla, sus acciones descontroladas tienen como desenlace el regreso de ellas a la hacienda, pero nadie imagina lo que sucederá.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gustavo sufre un accidente y en brazos de la muerte le revela a José quién es el verdadero padre de Paula. Sofía se siente desconsolada pero, en medio de la tragedia, es abordada por José y le cuenta que lo sabe todo. Los cobradores amenazan a Amador.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José chantajea a Sofía por el secreto de Paula y le pide dinero por su silencio. Él está dispuesto a intrigar a sus hermanos para enfrentarlos con Juan. Paula no puede controlar lo que siente por Juan.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noche tiene mucha seducción entre Verónica y Alejandro. David se presenta ante Verónica y le dice que le recuerda a su madre, a quién desprecia. Ella disimula cuánto le afecta el comentario. Antonia quiere matar poco a poco a la abuela de Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica logra despistar a David, pero cuando él se va, ella se viene abajo. La nueva Patrona atrae el interés de todos y Antonia está furiosa al ver que sus aliados la ignoran, incluyendo su amante. Verónica consigue que Alberto se ponga de su lado.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia se presenta en la casa de Verónica para declararle la guerra y la trata como si fuera Gabriela. Dantés la reta a desenterrar los restos de la minera muerta. La patrona Guerra acepta, pero Alejandro se opone rotundamente a la exhumación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Verónica hacen las paces tras confirmarse que el cadáver en la tumba corresponde a Gabriela Suárez. Ricardo le confiesa su problema de impotencia a Alejandro, al tiempo que le reclama el daño que le ha hecho a Patricia. Macario queda libre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar y Jimena alargan su divorcio, él le pide que ayude a Juan, lo mismo hace Franco con Sara, las dos prometen hablar con Norma. Rosario reconoce que su matrimonio es un fracaso.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, accused by Andy of being a gossip, sets out to prove that men are bigger gossips than women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, appointed judge of a beauty contest, shows the wisdom of Solomon by picking a popular winner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney finally solve the problem of moonshining in Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to counsel the constantly bickering couple, Fred and Jennie Boone, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy suspects that a traveling record promoter is a con artist and he fears for the townsfolk who invested in his record.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney's over-zealousness causes him to become a laughing stock, Andy tactfully arranges for Barney to regain his status.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A nationally known con man becomes a hero to Aunt Bee, Opie and Barney when he is held for two days in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy plays matchmaker for Barney but finds himself in difficulty when Barney misinterprets his efforts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie struggle to keep house when Aunt Bee leaves for a few days.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finally proposes to Ellie when he becomes convinced that the new young doctor in town is trying to steal his girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town drunk, Otis Campbell, turns out to be the only living descendant of a Revolutionary War hero, much to the dismay of the mayor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A state inspector learns some unique but effective police methods employed by the Mayberry sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie give the Cinderella treatment to a farmer's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, faced with the unpleasant duty of serving an eviction notice, discovers a way to save the mortgagee's home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has to deliver a baby for a farmer's wife when the local doctor is unavailable.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Through a series of coincidences, Barney captures a dangerous criminal--twice.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy helps a local musician get back to reality after success goes to his head.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Something new and different -- paint a wintry country scene on a wooden sawblade with guest artist Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to a lonely hidden cabin in the frozen mountainous north country with Bob Ross -- another black canvas masterpiece to fall in love with.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a golden selection of colors in this gorgeous fall mountain scene, all within a cleverly different oval shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Steve Ross as he creates a lovely oval painting, a winter landscape surrounding a frozen lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely hike down a weathered pathway with Bob Ross and happen upon an old cabin; create a beautiful oval painting you can be proud of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uncovers the extraordinary loveliness of nature, reflected in the mirror surface of a lake in front of a mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a warm winter morning, the surroundings still undisturbed by Nature's little creatures; enjoy the freshness of a new day not yet awake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Joyce Ortner captures the true beauty of the ocean waves, blue and enchanting in this breathtaking seascape masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a place just like this on a warm summer day - Bob Ross creates clear sky and shade trees by a nice swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint Bob Ross shanty and experience the tranquility of mysterious distant mountains and an inviting pond just outside the door.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Look out over the valley lake with Bob Ross and view truly majestic mountains and evergreens under the calm of soft, muted skies.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drive through mountain country with Bob Ross and happen upon a ridge of thick, rich evergreens gracing the hollow below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relax with Bob Ross as the perfect picnic spot emerges from his paint filled brushes - quiet peaks on a tranquil lake and luscious green velvety grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this oval painting, Bob Ross creates a wonderful scene where an old fence follows a trail to the edge of the woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you to experience the anticipation of winter's white blanket, moving in to create a soft, delicate draping of the cabin landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the golden glow of sunrise, join Bob Ross for a refreshing look at early morning where anglers work and thrive.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross teaches us the secret of his wet-on-wet technique while creating a restless ocean crashing against a rugged rocky coastline.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a majestic stand of evergreen trees overlooking tiny, sweet little flowers growing on a sloping knoll.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A spunky little river meanders its way through an autumn hillside bursting with splashes of color, as only Bob Ross can create!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely scenic mountain surrounded by quiet, soft, misty foothills - a beautiful painting that even a beginner can do with ease!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Narrow, winding, rocky - this little Bob Ross style creek moves closer and closer, flowing aimlessly through a happy little meadow forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes - brr!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a clear day, Bob Ross creates an almighty mountain captured by a clear blue sky - another spectacular masterpiece on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A virtual explosion of color as Bob Ross paints blazing orange and gold trees below a ridge of magnificent mountain peaks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes a detour from the trail and discovers a rarely used trail through country woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Crisp blue sky and lake embrace soft rolling hills and leafy trees - Bob Ross paints the stillness of evening perfectly on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Infighting threatens to tear the Red Team apart, and Camila learns the hard way why secret votes are meant to be secret.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The teams compete in the most terrifying challenge yet — 100 feet in the air. And things get personal when it's time to decide who's going into the Gulag.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Sarah and Laurel consider throwing the challenge to get rid of their weakest player. The game takes its toll on Brad and Tori's relationship.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Johnny faces a pumped up CT in the Gulag. And Sarah and Laurel hatch another plan to get rid of Cara Maria.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Two Challenge favorites are sent home in the final gulag. And the most grueling final challenge ever sends two competitors to the hospital.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack brings us bouncing baby animals from around the world. Some are cute, some are cuddly, and some bring us hope for the next generation of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hoof It
programme.desc: Giraffes, zebras, moose and bongo have very different coats, but they all wear the same shoe style. We’re talking about hoofs, of course! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down today’s featured creatures, all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon River basin of Peru, Jack discovers a group of young conservationists working to save orphaned and injured animals at Taricaya Rescue Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is counting down the wildest hooves, paws and claws in the animal kingdom- from the camel’s heavy-duty hooves to an ostrich’s razor-sharp claws, it’s feet first on this Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for some epic Hanna family adventures like game ranger training in South Africa, babysitting a wombat in Tasmania, trekking with mandrills in Gabon, a horseback safari through Montana and a trip to meet some donkeys in Arizona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: Today, join Jungle Jack as he counts down seven creatures so bizarre, you’ve gotta see them to believe them! The duck-billed platypus, pink dolphins, white zebra, albino alligators, and many more fascinating animals from the weird world of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along into the heart of the Amazon River Basin as Jack explores untouched jungles that are teeming with wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is lending a hand to Shamwari's world-renowned veterinarians and anti-poaching unit as they work on the front lines of conservation in South Africa.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet six exotic species and the habitats they call home sweet home. Corals in Curacao, Galapagos marine iguanas, Borneo’s orangutans, Tasmanian devils, mountain gorillas in Rwanda and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's coastal town of Pedasi is a haven for sea creatures. Jack encounters a nesting Sea Turtle, before visiting Isla Iguana where he searches for Black Iguanas, a colony of Frigate Birds, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes to work behind the scenes at the world-renowned Ann van Dyk Cheetah Center in South Africa where over 800 Cheetah cubs have been bred in the last 40 years. Jack also comes face-to-face with rare African Wild Dogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi journey to the remote beaches of Santa Rosa National Park in Costa Rica to look for elusive jaguars that prey on nesting sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack meets up with amazing animal moms and the little ones they care for. A jaguar looking after her cub, a baby bear sleeping alongside its mom, a white rhino protecting her calf, a cheetah mom in South Africa and whole herd of elephant mammas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins the massive operation to relocate several Big Horns from Tonto National Forest to the Catalina Mountains in an effort to reintroduce the animals back into their native range.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of nature’s most fearsome fangs. Hippos, Rattlesnakes, Baboons, Bats, Lions, and Devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago is home to beautiful beaches and pristine waters, and it's also home to a high concentration of Bats! Jack hikes into a remote cave for an up-close look at the beneficial species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets the lucky creatures that are cared for by some of the most interesting veterinarians from across the world. Koalas, Cheetahs, Gorillas, Dogs, Eland, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits a breeding project focused on saving the endangered condor, the largest flying bird in the world. With its unique location in the middle of prime condor habitat, “condor Hausi” hopes to reproduce the massive bird in captivity.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the tropical Caribbean Island of Curacao! Join Jungle Jack as he braves a deep diving Submarine, encounters Dolphins on the high seas, and rolls up his sleeves for Coral Reef Conservation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: In Africa, the Lion is king! This is the only place on the planet where white lions roam free. Join Jack as he searches for Big Cats and Big Adventure in the unique arid landscape of Sanbona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of the earthiest creatures in the world. Mud-loving elephants, nesting gators, burrowing penguins, sand-dwelling bee-eaters and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Smarts
programme.desc: Today’s animals are headed to the top of the class! Jungle Jack counts down some of nature’s most clever creatures, like dolphins, chimpanzees, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jungle Critters
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers creatures living in the deep, dark jungle. Elusive reptiles like pythons and caimans, river-dwellers like piranha and Amazonian manatees and massive primates like lowland gorillas.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction...a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group learns that a truce with the Governor must come with a huge sacrifice on their part; Rick decides Michonne's fate.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the Governor's impending attack looms, Rick and the others consider whether the prison is worth defending; Andrea struggles to escape captivity.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
